  1. Home
  2. Cookie Policy

Cookie Policy

Last updated: January 1, 2024

1. What Are Cookies?

Cookies are small text files stored on your device when you visit a website. They are widely used to make websites work more efficiently, provide a better user experience, and give website owners information about how their site is being used.

2. How We Use Cookies

GameGuidePro uses cookies for the following purposes:

  • Essential functionality — To remember your preferences (e.g., theme selection)
  • Analytics — To understand how visitors use our site (e.g., page views, traffic sources)
  • Marketing / Advertising — To display relevant ads through Google AdSense

3. Cookie Categories

CategoryPurposeDurationRequired?
FunctionalStores theme preference, cookie consent choicePersistent (localStorage)Yes — site cannot function without
AnalyticsGoogle Analytics (_ga, _gid) — measures site traffic and usage patternsUp to 2 yearsNo — requires consent
MarketingGoogle AdSense (doubleclick.net, __gads, __gpi) — personalized advertisingVaries (up to 13 months)No — requires consent

4. Third-Party Cookies

The following third parties may set cookies on our Site:

ProviderCookiesPurpose
Google AdSense__gads, __gpi, IDE, DSID, NIDServing personalized advertisements
Google Analytics_ga, _gid, _gat, _gac_*Website analytics and reporting

5. Your GDPR Rights Regarding Cookies

Under the GDPR, you have the following rights:

  • Right to be Informed: You are being informed through this Cookie Policy and our cookie consent banner
  • Right to Withdraw Consent: You may withdraw your cookie consent at any time by clearing localStorage and reloading the page, or by using the cookie banner options
  • Right to Object: You may object to the use of certain cookies, particularly marketing cookies
  • Right to Block/ Delete: You can manage cookies through your browser settings (see below)

6. How to Manage Cookies

You can control and manage cookies in several ways:

  • Cookie Consent Banner: Use our banner (displayed at the bottom of the page) to accept, reject, or customize your cookie preferences at any time
  • Browser Settings: Most browsers allow you to block or delete cookies through their settings:
    • Chrome
    • Firefox
    • Safari
    • Edge
  • Google Ads Settings: Opt out of personalized Google ads at Google Ads Settings
  • Network Advertising Initiative: Opt out of interest-based ads at NAI Opt-Out

7. Changes to This Policy

We may update this Cookie Policy from time to time. Changes will be posted on this page with an updated date.

8. Contact Us

For questions about cookies, contact us at privacy@gameguidepro.com.
